content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the failure reconciliation implementation across 7 changed files (~4200 lines). The implementation is correct, well-tested (9 dedicated unit tests + 4 daemon integration tests + updated existing tests), idempotent, and follows established patterns from success_reconciliation. All acceptance criteria are met: BeadFailed journal events are recorded, beads are NOT closed on failure, attempt counting works, escalation to NeedsOperator after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES=3, idempotent duplicate handling, structured tracing, clippy clean, nix build passes. The stale started_at guard in fs.rs prevents a subtle data corruption vector. The daemon wiring properly validates run identity from multiple durable sources before reconciling. No correctness bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
